name: 太阳系
subject: inquiry
domain_name: 地球与宇宙 / Earth & Space / Earth & Space
curriculum_points: Students in PYP 4-5 will be able to describe the components of our solar system (sun, planets, moons) and compare celestial bodies based on their relative size, position, and composition.
